codeReview.summary: The fix directly addresses the prior blocking regression: `ServerState` now wires `AmbientService.on_note` to `ambient_notes.save_note`, restoring ambient note persistence. Added server tests validate callback wiring and non-no-op behavior.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The default `test` command in the shared services registry still skips `tests/test_audio.py` and `tests/test_llm.py`, which can hide regressions now that broken-import fixes are complete and full-suite validation is expected.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/services.yaml:3 sets `test: uv run pytest --ignore=tests/test_audio.py --ignore=tests/test_llm.py -x -q`; handoffs for fix-broken-imports-tests and fix-ambient-note-callback report using full `uv run pytest -x -q`.

summary: PASS. Reviewed transcript skeleton and both relevant diffs (d1866b3 and 683ec9b). The fix removes the no-op ambient callback identified in the prior failed review and restores persistence via `ambient_notes.save_note`; no blocking code issues found.
